name: redbar
description: Spec-driven test agents for every layer. Math finds what you changed that nothing tests; agents write it — unit, integration, e2e — following your team's spec, not the model's.
author: Emerson Silva

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch -m "chore: release v%s" && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor -m "chore: release v%s" && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major -m "chore: release v%s" && git push --follow-tags
